name: MongoDB, Inc.
description: MongoDB, Inc. is an American software company that develops and provides commercial support for its namesake source-available, NoSQL database engine. Designed for modern application development, the platform handles unstructured data with high flexibility and scalability. Beyond its core database, the company offers MongoDB Atlas, a fully managed global cloud database service that enables developers to run applications anywhere. Headquartered in New York City, MongoDB has evolved from its origins as 10gen to become a critical infrastructure provider for enterprises worldwide, supporting complex workloads ranging from transactional processing to advanced AI-driven applications.
